hero.title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
hero.reason: In honor of Star Wars Day, a celebration on May 4 that plays off the phrase 'May the Fourth be with you', this iconic film is a perfect choice to commemorate the occasion, as it revolutionized the science fiction genre and became a cultural phenomenon.
hero.blurb: A groundbreaking film that has stood the test of time, with its memorable characters, engaging storyline, and impressive visual effects. It's a must-watch for any fan of the franchise or science fiction in general.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero film was a highly anticipated installment in the Spider-Man franchise, offering an action-packed storyline with impressive visual effects and a star-studded cast.
released.blurb: While it may not be the best in the franchise, Spider-Man 3 still offers an entertaining experience with its engaging storyline and memorable characters. The film's themes of friendship and sacrifice also add depth to the narrative.

birthday.title: Renaissance Man
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Will Smith, born May 4, 1968, starring in this comedy-drama film that showcases his versatility as an actor, playing a charming and unconventional teacher who helps his students find their potential.
birthday.blurb: With Will Smith's charismatic performance, Renaissance Man is a heartwarming and uplifting film that explores themes of self-discovery and personal growth. The movie's blend of humor and drama makes it an enjoyable watch.

awful.title: Birdemic: Shock and Terror
awful.reason: This notoriously bad film has gained a cult following for its inexplicable plot, atrocious acting, and hilariously terrible special effects, making it a prime example of a 'so-bad-it's-good' movie.
awful.blurb: With its cringe-worthy dialogue and amateurish production quality, Birdemic: Shock and Terror is a laughable disaster that will leave you questioning the sanity of its creators. It's a trainwreck that you can't look away from, fascinated by its sheer audacity.
